text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing my work for the morning, I make
my way to the cafeteria to get some lunch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: This weather's perfect for a picnic!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It really is. Do let me know if any of you fancy a
nap. You can lay your head in my lap anytime. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Why would anyone sleep now? We're about to
chow down here. Anyway, did everyone bring
their stuff?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Of course! ☆

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Okay, on three, then. One, two... three!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the count of three, everyone takes out their
lunch boxes and places them onto the picnic
sheet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the boxes are opened up, I see that each
one is packed to the brim with appetizing side
dishes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Would you like to join us?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Food tastes way better when you eat it
together with everyone. ☆

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Come on over. Do you fancy anything in
particular? I'll plate it right up for you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And don't hold back! Make sure you eat up so
you're ready to go all afternoon.
choice_data_list: Are you all sharing your lunches?
Are you all sharing your lunches?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yep. We like to meet up and share different
recipes with each other. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Different people show up every time, but us three
always make sure to come!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I learn so many recipes coming to these
meet-ups. Like this stuff! It's real good. Try some!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
These are just roasted yams, but they taste great
with these seaweed flakes on top. And the sweet
sauce really brings out the flavor, too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The spring onions paired with the crispy pork
belly over there have a bit of a kick, so that
combo's sure to get your mouth watering. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Go ahead and eat up! Do you like it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bite in the spring onions goes perfectly with
the fatty pork, while the seaweed smells homely
and the sweet sauce infuses me with sheer delight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I savor the lingering taste of the yams, which melt
on my tongue like fluffy velvet. There's only one
way to describe all this food...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The ingredients and seasonings are pretty basic,
but it's moreish as hell, right?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, look at you, stuffing your cheeks like
that... Hehehe. You look darling, dear. But there's
plenty of food left, so you needn't rush.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Seeing someone enjoy my food so much makes all
that slaving over a stove worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! How about we make one of your
favorite foods for next time? Do you have any
specific requests?
choice_data_list: I'd like a steak to make me stronger!
I'd like a mind-numbingly spicy curry!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, steak! Meat's always a good choice. ☆ It'll
definitely make you stronger and more energetic,
too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's nothin' wrong with a simple sear, but I
wanna take this chance to try out some other
grilling techniques. How rare do you want your
steak?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We could try making various sauces, too! That'd
be fun. ♪ What kind of sauce would you like?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. It feels a little bit special when you're
making food for a certain someone. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Taking one person's preferences into
consideration instead of just making a dish for
everyone to enjoy... Yeah, this should be super
fun too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you two! Let's put our heads together
and think up a new steak recipe!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend a lovely afternoon drooling over the
amazing spread and feeling beyond grateful for
the wonderful meet-up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Really? You want something that spicy? Are you
okay with hot stuff?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I like that spunk of yours. We'll make it
extra spicy for ya, so you'd better show us what
you're made of and put it all away!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It'd be nice to have something to balance out the
heat. Milk would be a good option, but soy milk
might be better suited to a packed lunch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Don't make your meal an ordeal, Trainer! The most important thing is for you to enjoy your lunch! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The spicier the curry, the more intense it'll be,
so...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Let's make some lassi to drink on the
day. And instead of rice, we can bake some sweet
naan to go with the curry, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a lively lunch listening to the three of them
brainstorming different recipes.
